title: U Mass - Non-esterified Fatty Acids
author: Jason Kim
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x3hfqj6

steps.instruction: Add 5 μl (or 1~10 μl) of serum or plasma sample to a well of Plate A.
Add dilution buffer to each well to reach a total sample volume of 50 μl.
Addition of 5 μl results in a 10x dilution of sample (5 μl of serum/plasma sample in 50 μl total sample volume).
Add 50 μl of each standard to empty wells. Use Plate B if necessary.
Add 10.5 ml of the reconstituted FFA Reagent A to one of the disposable trays provided with the kit.
Add 100 μl of FFA Reagent A to each well.
Gently shake the plate to ensure thorough mixing.
Place in a 37ºC incubator for 10 minutes.
Add 5.5 ml of the reconstituted FFA Reagent B to the other disposable tray provided with the kit.
Add 50 μl of FFA Reagent B to each well.
Gently shake the plate to ensure thorough mixing.
Place in a 37ºC incubator for 10 minutes.
Allow the plate to equilibrate to room temperature for 5 minutes. During this time, ensure that there are no bubbles in the solution mixture.
Use a large gauge needle or clean pipet tip to pop any bubbles as this will result in inaccurate absorbance readings.
Measure the optical density of each well at 540 nm.
